text_preview:
Military Internal Correspondence

Ministry of Aeronautics

Santa Cruz Air Base

1st Fighter Aviation Group

Santa Cruz, May 28, 1986

From: Cap Av – M.B J.

To: Commander of the 1st Gp Av Ca

Subject: Report of the Fact Occurred on 19/05/86 (Monday)

I – On the night of May 19, 1986, I was ordered to immediate take off for identification of radar contacts visualized by THOR.

During the displacement, I was informed by the Air Defense, that approximately 5 contacts, were approaching my 12-hours at 20 MN. I inform you that the night was clear, cloudless and with a full moon. I did not obtain eye
summary: Santa Cruz Air Base pilot report from May 19, 1986 describes seeing a red light toward the sea from São José dos Campos that could not be approached, part of the UFO Night event.
